# ADR-0001: Dependency review

## Status

Accepted

## Context

This record declares its status through a `## Status` heading section, the original ADR form's own canonical dialect. Its frontmatter carries the `review-by` date but no `status:` field. The `review-by` date of 2025-06-01 is well in the past relative to any run of this fixture. Seeded violation: staleness clock expired (D6), visible only when accepted-ness is read from the heading dialect.

## Decision

N/A. Fixture file.

## Consequences

N/A. Fixture file.
